name: Kadane's Algorithm
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement:
Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum and return the sum of the elements present in that subarray.


A subarray is a contiguous non-empty sequence of elements within an array.

examples.explanation: The subarray from index 0 to index 4 has the largest sum = 15
The element on index 0 or index 3 make up the largest sum when taken as a subarray
